q: Find the missing number in the series: 4, 9, 16, 25, ?
If CAT = 24 and DOG = 26, then BAT = ?
Pointing to a man, a woman said, 'His mother is the only daughter of my mother.' Relation?
explain: The woman is the man's mother.

q: If 1st January 2020 was a Wednesday, what day was 1st January 2021?
explain: Leap year adds 2 odd days. Wed + 2 = Friday.

q: A man facing north turns 90° right, then 180° left. Which direction is he facing?
How many times do the hands of a clock coincide in a day?
Statements: All bags are pockets. All pockets are shops. Conclusion: All bags are shops.
A, B, C, D, E on bench. A next to B, C next to D. C is 2nd from right. A is right of B. Position of A?
explain: Arrangement: E B A C D.
